datasheet.name: Arjac Rockfist
datasheet.lore: Arjac Rockfist is a towering mass of muscle and a taciturn anvil of endurance. Wielding the enormous Foehammer – recalling his former role as an Iron Priest of the forge – Arjac crushes his foes with pulverising strength. As personal champion of the Great Wolf, Arjac upholds the honour of the Chapter.
datasheet.unitComposition:
■ **1 Arjac Rockfist – EPIC HERO**

**This model is equipped with:** Foehammer.

abilities.name: Deep Strike
abilities.rules: Each time this unit makes an ingress move (20.04), if every model in this unit has this ability, it can be set up anywhere on the battlefield that is more than 8" horizontally from all enemy units, even if that is within your opponent’s deployment zone.
abilities.lore: There are many ways by which to deploy troops to the field of battle including tunnels, teleportation devices and other esoteric means of transportation.

abilities.name: Leader
abilities.rules:
Before the battle, in the Muster Armies step, for each leader and support unit in your army, you can select one friendly bodyguard unit that unit can lead. That unit will then lead that bodyguard unit for the battle and form an attached unit with it. 

Unless otherwise stated, each bodyguard unit can only have one leader unit and one support unit attached to it.

See Attached Units (19)
abilities.lore: Mighty heroes fight at the forefront of battle.

abilities.name: Anvil of Endurance
abilities.rules: While this model is leading a unit, each time a model in that unit is destroyed by a melee attack, if that model has not fought this phase, roll one D6: on a 4+, do not remove the destroyed model from play. The destroyed model can fight after the attacking unit has finished making its attacks, and is then removed from play.

abilities.name: Champion of the Kingsguard
abilities.rules: Each time this model makes a melee attack that targets a **CHARACTER** unit, you can re‑roll the Hit roll and you can re‑roll the Wound roll.

datasheet_rules.name: Leader
datasheet_rules.rules:
This model can be attached to the following units:

■ **WOLF GUARD TERMINATORS**

datasheet.name: Bjorn the Fell-Handed
datasheet.lore: Most ancient of all Space Marines and last of the Company of Russ, Bjorn the Fell-Handed has fought for millennia within a Dreadnought’s sarcophagus. The Space Wolves revere Bjorn as a living link to their deepest past, waking him only in times of dire need, and he still fights as furiously as he did at Russ’ side.
datasheet.unitComposition:
■ **1 Bjorn the Fell-Handed– EPIC HERO**

**This model is equipped with:** assault cannon; heavy flamer; Trueclaw.

abilities.name: Deadly Demise 1
abilities.rules:
This ability always takes the form Deadly Demise X. Each time a model in this unit is destroyed, after the units embarked within it (if any) have made their emergency disembark moves, roll one D6. On a 6, that model suffers a deadly demise; each unit within 6" of that model suffers a number of mortal wounds denoted by X (if this is a random number, roll separately for each unit within 6").

Example: An Impulsor with a unit of Intercessors embarked within it is destroyed by ranged attacks. First, any unresolved attacks made by the attacking unit are resolved. Then the Intercessors make an emergency disembark move. Then the roll is made for the Deadly Demise ability, and on a 6, that ability is resolved. Finally, the Impulsor is removed from the battlefield.
abilities.lore: From detonating ammo stores to corrosive innards or frenzied death throes, some targets are deadly even in defeat.

abilities.name: Feel No Pain 5+
abilities.rules: This ability always takes the form Feel No Pain X+. Each time a model with this ability would lose a wound, roll one D6: on an X+, that wound is not lost.
abilities.lore: The hardiest warriors refuse to be laid low, even by wounds that should by all rights prove lethal.

abilities.name: Legendary Tenacity
abilities.rules: Each time an attack targets this model, if the Strength characteristic of that attack is greater than this model’s Toughness characteristic, subtract 1 from the Wound roll.

abilities.name: Ancient Tactician
abilities.rules: At the start of your Command phase, if this model is on the battlefield, you gain 1CP.

wargear_rules.rulesText:
■ This model’s assault cannon can be replaced with one of the following:
◦ Helfrost cannon
◦ Multi-melta

wargear_options.instructionText: This model’s assault cannon can be replaced with one of the following:
This model’s assault cannon can be replaced with one of the following:

datasheet.name: Blood Claws
datasheet.lore: Young and fiery warriors full of belligerent enthusiasm, Blood Claws hunger to prove themselves in savage battle. They plunge headlong into the foe with relentless exuberance, straddling the line between sheer heroism and recklessness. Many great sagas start with the Blood Claws’ glory hunts.
datasheet.unitComposition:
■ **1 Blood Claw Pack Leader**
■ **9-19 Blood Claws**

**Every model is equipped with:** bolt pistol; Astartes chainsword.

abilities.name: Berserk Charge
abilities.rules: This unit is eligible to declare a charge in a turn in which it Advanced.

wargear_rules.rulesText: ■ The Blood Claw Pack Leader’s bolt pistol can be replaced with 1 plasma pistol.
■ The Blood Claw Pack Leader’s Astartes chainsword can be replaced with 1 power weapon.

wargear_options.instructionText: The Blood Claw Pack Leader’s bolt pistol can be replaced with 1 plasma pistol.
The Blood Claw Pack Leader’s Astartes chainsword can be replaced with 1 power weapon.

datasheet.name: Fenrisian Wolves
datasheet.lore: Amongst the most vicious and intelligent predators in the galaxy, Fenrisian Wolves accompany the sons of Russ to battle, following them as the pack follows the alpha. Even the sleekest are as big as a Human, yet they prowl silently before pouncing in a swift and coordinated flurry of razor-sharp teeth and claws.
datasheet.unitComposition:
■ **5-10 Fenrisian Wolves**

**Every model is equipped with:** teeth and claws.

abilities.name: Predatory Instinct
abilities.rules: In your opponent's Movement phase, if an enemy unit ends a move within 8” of this unit, if this unit is not within Engagement Range of one or more enemy units, this unit can make a Normal move of up to D6”.

abilities.name: Hunting Hounds
abilities.rules: While this unit is within 6" of one or more friendly **SPACE WOLVES CHARACTER** models (excluding **WULFEN** models), if this unit is not Battle‑shocked, models in it have an Objective Control characteristic of 1.

datasheet.name: Grey Hunters
datasheet.lore: With their instinctive raw aggression tempered – but never quashed – by countless battlefield victories, Grey Hunters are patient, cunning and adaptable. Some packs take and hold ground, unleashing volleys of disciplined firepower, while others stalk the flanks. When the trap is set, Grey Hunters leap in for the kill.
datasheet.unitComposition:
■ **1 Grey Hunter Pack Leader**
■ **9 Grey Hunters**

**Every model is equipped with:** bolt carbine; bolt pistol; Astartes chainsword.

abilities.name: Cunning Hunters
abilities.rules: Each time a model in this unit makes an attack, re‑roll a Wound roll of 1. If the target is within range of an objective marker, you can re‑roll the Wound roll instead.

wargear_rules.rulesText: ■ The Grey Hunter Pack Leader’s bolt carbine can be replaced with 1 plasma pistol.

■ The Grey Hunter Pack Leader’s Astartes Chainsword can be replaced with one of the following:
◦ 1 power fist
◦ 1 power weapon

wargear_options.instructionText: The Grey Hunter Pack Leader’s Astartes chainsword can be replaced with one of the following:
The Grey Hunter Pack Leader’s Astartes chainsword can be replaced with one of the following:
The Grey Hunter Pack Leader’s bolt carbine can be replaced with 1 plasma pistol.

datasheet.name: Iron Priest
datasheet.lore: Space Wolves Techmarines – the Iron Priests – are holders of arcane technological lore that they use to repair the Chapter’s damaged war engines and soothe their affronted machine spirits. Warriors of Fenris first and foremost, Iron Priests will not hesitate to bring their own esoteric weapons to bear on the foe if needed.
datasheet.unitComposition:
■ **1 Iron Priest**

**This model is equipped with:** helfrost pistol; tempest hammer and servo‑arm.

abilities.name: Leader
abilities.rules:
Before the battle, in the Muster Armies step, for each leader and support unit in your army, you can select one friendly bodyguard unit that unit can lead. That unit will then lead that bodyguard unit for the battle and form an attached unit with it. 

Unless otherwise stated, each bodyguard unit can only have one leader unit and one support unit attached to it.

See Attached Units (19)
abilities.lore: Mighty heroes fight at the forefront of battle.

abilities.name: Iron Priest
abilities.rules: While this model is within 3" of one or more friendly **ADEPTUS ASTARTES VEHICLE** units, this model has the Lone Operative ability.

abilities.name: Gift of the Iron Wolf
abilities.rules: In your Command phase, you can select one friendly **ADEPTUS ASTARTES VEHICLE** model within 3" of this model. That model regains up to D3 lost wounds and, until the start of your next Command phase, select one ranged weapon equipped by that model to have the **[RAPID FIRE 1]** ability. Each model can only be selected for this ability or the Blessing of the Omnissiah ability once per turn.

abilities.name: Judgement of the Omnissiah
abilities.rules: Each time this model makes an attack that targets an enemy unit within Engagement Range of one or more friendly **ADEPTUS ASTARTES VEHICLE** units, you can re‑roll the Wound roll.

datasheet_rules.name: Leader
datasheet_rules.rules:
This model can be attached to the following units:

■ **BLOOD CLAWS**
■ **GREY HUNTERS**
■ **WOLF GUARD HEADTAKERS**

datasheet.name: Logan Grimnar
datasheet.lore: Logan Grimnar – Great Wolf and High King of Fenris – is one of the longest serving Chapter Masters. Waging war against any who threaten the Space Wolves or the Imperium, Grimnar’s charisma and centuries of heroic victories have immortalised him as one of the most lauded warriors in the galaxy.
datasheet.unitComposition:
■ **Logan Grimnar – EPIC HERO**

**This model is equipped with:** storm bolter; Axe Morkai; Tyrnak and Fenrir.

abilities.name: Deep Strike
abilities.rules: Each time this unit makes an ingress move (20.04), if every model in this unit has this ability, it can be set up anywhere on the battlefield that is more than 8" horizontally from all enemy units, even if that is within your opponent’s deployment zone.
abilities.lore: There are many ways by which to deploy troops to the field of battle including tunnels, teleportation devices and other esoteric means of transportation.

abilities.name: Leader
abilities.rules:
Before the battle, in the Muster Armies step, for each leader and support unit in your army, you can select one friendly bodyguard unit that unit can lead. That unit will then lead that bodyguard unit for the battle and form an attached unit with it. 

Unless otherwise stated, each bodyguard unit can only have one leader unit and one support unit attached to it.

See Attached Units (19)
abilities.lore: Mighty heroes fight at the forefront of battle.

abilities.name: High King of Fenris
abilities.rules: Once per battle round, in your Movement phase, you can select one friendly **SPACE WOLVES** unit that is in Reserves. If you do, until the end of the phase, for the purpose of setting up that unit on the battlefield, treat the current battle round number as being one higher than it actually is.

abilities.name: Guile of the Wolf
abilities.rules: Once per turn, when your opponent targets a unit from their army within 12” of this model with a **stratagem**, you can use this ability. If you do increase the CP cost of that use of that **stratagem** by 1CP.

datasheet_rules.name: Embarking Within Transports
datasheet_rules.rules: This model can embark within friendly **ADEPTUS ASTARTES TRANSPORT** models that can transport **TERMINATOR** models. When doing so, it takes up the space of 4 Infantry models.

datasheet_rules.name: Leader
datasheet_rules.rules:
This model can be attached to the following units:

■ **WOLF GUARD TERMINATORS**

datasheet.name: Murderfang
datasheet.lore: A stampeding mechanical beast is unleashed from beneath the Fang in times of need, its massively brutal claws tearing its foes limb from bloody limb. The Chapter names it Murderfang. Its true identity is unknown for its insensate snarling rages are bereft of speech; it is known now only as a force of untamed destruction.
datasheet.unitComposition:
■ **Murderfang – EPIC HERO**

**This model is equipped with:** heavy flamer; storm bolter; Murderclaws.

abilities.name: Deadly Demise 1
abilities.rules:
This ability always takes the form Deadly Demise X. Each time a model in this unit is destroyed, after the units embarked within it (if any) have made their emergency disembark moves, roll one D6. On a 6, that model suffers a deadly demise; each unit within 6" of that model suffers a number of mortal wounds denoted by X (if this is a random number, roll separately for each unit within 6").

Example: An Impulsor with a unit of Intercessors embarked within it is destroyed by ranged attacks. First, any unresolved attacks made by the attacking unit are resolved. Then the Intercessors make an emergency disembark move. Then the roll is made for the Deadly Demise ability, and on a 6, that ability is resolved. Finally, the Impulsor is removed from the battlefield.
abilities.lore: From detonating ammo stores to corrosive innards or frenzied death throes, some targets are deadly even in defeat.

abilities.name: Feel No Pain 6+
abilities.rules: This ability always takes the form Feel No Pain X+. Each time a model with this ability would lose a wound, roll one D6: on an X+, that wound is not lost.
abilities.lore: The hardiest warriors refuse to be laid low, even by wounds that should by all rights prove lethal.

abilities.name: Murder-maker
abilities.rules: In the Fight phase, each time an attack targets a friendly **WULFEN** unit within 6" of this model, if a model in that unit is destroyed as a result of that attack, if that model has not fought this phase, roll one D6: on a 4+, do not remove the destroyed model from play; it can fight after the attacking unit has finished making its attacks, and is then removed from play.

abilities.name: Bestial Fury
abilities.rules: You can re‑roll Advance and Charge rolls made for this model.

datasheet.name: Njal Stormcaller
datasheet.lore: Summoning ice-toothed blizzards to scatter his foes, Njal Stormcaller is an elemental focus of psychic fury. He is High Rune Priest of the Space Wolves and wields a crackling staff by which he nullifies enemy sorceries.
datasheet.unitComposition:
■ **1 Njal Stormcaller – EPIC HERO**

**This model is equipped with:** bolt pistol; Living Lightning; Staff of the Stormcaller.

abilities.name: Leader
abilities.rules:
Before the battle, in the Muster Armies step, for each leader and support unit in your army, you can select one friendly bodyguard unit that unit can lead. That unit will then lead that bodyguard unit for the battle and form an attached unit with it. 

Unless otherwise stated, each bodyguard unit can only have one leader unit and one support unit attached to it.

See Attached Units (19)
abilities.lore: Mighty heroes fight at the forefront of battle.

abilities.name: Wind Walker
abilities.rules: While this model is leading a unit, ranged weapons equipped by models in that unit have the **[ASSAULT]** ability and each time that unit Advances, do not make an Advance roll. Instead, until the end of the phase, add 6" to the Move characteristic of models in this unit.

abilities.name: Tempest’s Wrath
abilities.rules: In your Shooting phase, after this model’s unit has shot, select one enemy unit (excluding **MONSTERS** and **VEHICLES**) hit by one or more of those attacks made with this model’s Living Lightning weapon. Until the start of your next turn, that enemy unit is stormwracked. While a unit is stormwracked, subtract 6" from the Range characteristic of ranged weapons equipped by models in that unit (to a minimum of 12").

datasheet_rules.name: Leader
datasheet_rules.rules:
This model can be attached to the following units:

■ **BLOOD CLAWS**
■ **GREY HUNTERS**
■ **WOLF GUARD HEADTAKERS**

datasheet.name: Ragnar Blackmane
datasheet.lore: Supremely confident and eager always to be first into the fray, Wolf Lord Ragnar Blackmane regularly leads his Great Company in devastating planetary invasions. No longer as headstrong as in his youth, Ragnar’s berserk rages are still furious hurricanes of violence, and his terrifying howls freeze the blood of his foes.
datasheet.unitComposition:
■ **1 Ragnar Blackmane – EPIC HERO**

**This model is equipped with:** bolt pistol; Frostfang.

abilities.name: Leader
abilities.rules:
Before the battle, in the Muster Armies step, for each leader and support unit in your army, you can select one friendly bodyguard unit that unit can lead. That unit will then lead that bodyguard unit for the battle and form an attached unit with it. 

Unless otherwise stated, each bodyguard unit can only have one leader unit and one support unit attached to it.

See Attached Units (19)
abilities.lore: Mighty heroes fight at the forefront of battle.

abilities.name: War Howl
abilities.rules: While this model is leading a **BLOOD CLAWS** unit, each time a model in that unit makes a melee attack, you can re‑roll the Wound roll. While this model is leading a **WOLF GUARD HEADTAKERS** unit, that unit is eligible to declare a charge in a turn in which it Advanced.

abilities.name: Battle-lust
abilities.rules: Each time this model ends a Charge move, until the end of the turn, add 2 to the Attacks characteristic of this model’s Frostfang weapon.

datasheet_rules.name: Leader
datasheet_rules.rules:
This model can be attached to the following units:

■ **BLOOD CLAWS**
■ **WOLF GUARD HEADTAKERS**

datasheet.name: Thunderwolf Cavalry
datasheet.lore: Thunderwolves are monstrous and solitary alpha predators, and only the most dauntless elite within the Wolf Guard have the dominance to ride them to war. When they charge, crushing jaws tear through armoured plates, flesh and bone with feral butchery, while the thunderwolves’ riders hack down the foe with heroic ferocity.
datasheet.unitComposition:
■ **1 Thunderwolf Cavalry Pack Leader**
■ **2-5 Thunderwolf Cavalry**

**Every model is equipped with:** bolt pistol; teeth and claws; Wolf Guard weapon.

abilities.name: Thunderous Charge
abilities.rules: Each time a model in this unit makes a melee attack with its Wolf Guard weapon, if it made a Charge move this turn, add 1 to the Damage characteristic of that attack.

wargear_rules.rulesText:
■ Any number of models can each have their bolt pistol replaced with one of the following:
◦ 1 boltgun
◦ 1 storm shield
■ For every 3 models in this unit, one model’s bolt pistol can be replaced with 1 plasma pistol.

weapon_profiles.ruleText: The bearer has a 4+ invulnerable save.

wargear_options.instructionText: Any number of models can each have their bolt pistol replaced with one of the following:
Any number of models can each have their bolt pistol replaced with one of the following:

datasheet.name: Ulrik the Slayer
datasheet.lore: A paragon of wisdom and experience, Ulrik the Slayer has mentored many of the Space Wolves’ greatest champions. He is the Wolf High Priest, inspiring all who fight alongside him with his aggression and martial prowess. Turning his fearsome gaze upon mighty foes, Ulrik swears weighty oaths to cut them down.
datasheet.unitComposition:
■ **1 Ulrik the Slayer – EPIC HERO**

**This model is equipped with:** plasma pistol; artificer crozius arcanum.

abilities.name: Feel No Pain 6+
abilities.rules: This ability always takes the form Feel No Pain X+. Each time a model with this ability would lose a wound, roll one D6: on an X+, that wound is not lost.
abilities.lore: The hardiest warriors refuse to be laid low, even by wounds that should by all rights prove lethal.

abilities.name: Leader
abilities.rules:
Before the battle, in the Muster Armies step, for each leader and support unit in your army, you can select one friendly bodyguard unit that unit can lead. That unit will then lead that bodyguard unit for the battle and form an attached unit with it. 

Unless otherwise stated, each bodyguard unit can only have one leader unit and one support unit attached to it.

See Attached Units (19)
abilities.lore: Mighty heroes fight at the forefront of battle.

abilities.name: Slayer’s Oath
abilities.rules: At the start of the battle, select one of the following keywords to be this model’s Slayer’s Oath: **CHARACTER**; **MONSTER**; **VEHICLE**. The first time this model’s unit destroys a unit with this model’s Slayer’s Oath keyword, if your Detachment rule has a Saga, until the end of the battle, this model’s unit receives the benefits of that Detachment rule as if that Saga had been completed.

abilities.name: Oathbound
abilities.rules: While this model is leading a unit, each time a model in that unit makes a melee attack, add 1 to the Hit roll. If that attack targets a unit that has this model’s Slayer’s Oath keyword (see Slayer’s Oath), add 1 to the Wound roll as well.

datasheet_rules.name: Leader
datasheet_rules.rules:
This model can be attached to the following units:

■ **BLOOD CLAWS**
■ **GREY HUNTERS**
■ **WOLF GUARD HEADTAKERS**

datasheet.name: Venerable Dreadnought
datasheet.lore: Venerable Dreadnoughts are priceless relics steeped in centuries of battle. The ancient warriors at the heart of each are living legends of the Space Wolves, with wisdom as deep as the ocean and intuition as sharp as krakens’ teeth. Awoken from dormancy, they fight as lords of battle, seemingly stepping from the sagas to kill in the name of Russ.
datasheet.unitComposition:
■ **1 Venerable Dreadnought**

**This model is equipped with:** assault cannon; storm bolter; Dreadnought combat weapon.

abilities.name: Deadly Demise 1
abilities.rules:
This ability always takes the form Deadly Demise X. Each time a model in this unit is destroyed, after the units embarked within it (if any) have made their emergency disembark moves, roll one D6. On a 6, that model suffers a deadly demise; each unit within 6" of that model suffers a number of mortal wounds denoted by X (if this is a random number, roll separately for each unit within 6").

Example: An Impulsor with a unit of Intercessors embarked within it is destroyed by ranged attacks. First, any unresolved attacks made by the attacking unit are resolved. Then the Intercessors make an emergency disembark move. Then the roll is made for the Deadly Demise ability, and on a 6, that ability is resolved. Finally, the Impulsor is removed from the battlefield.
abilities.lore: From detonating ammo stores to corrosive innards or frenzied death throes, some targets are deadly even in defeat.

abilities.name: Fervour of the Ancients
abilities.rules: While a friendly **SPACE WOLVES** unit is within 6" of this model, add 1 to Advance and Charge rolls made for that unit.

wargear_rules.rulesText:
■ This model’s assault cannon can be replaced with one of the following:
◦ 1 helfrost cannon
◦ 1 multi-melta
■ This model’s storm bolter can be replaced with 1 heavy flamer.

■ This model’s assault cannon, storm bolter and Dreadnought combat weapon can be replaced with one of the following:
◦ 1 Fenrisian great axe, 1 blizzard shield and 1 storm bolter
◦ 1 Fenrisian great axe, 1 blizzard shield and 1 heavy flamer

datasheet.name: Wolf Guard Battle Leader
datasheet.lore: Mighty champions all, these warriors are entrusted by their Wolf Lords with the responsibility of leadership and demonstrate an exceptional gift for strategic command. As members of the Wolf Guard, Battle Leaders have access to a range of relic weapons, enabling them to lead their warriors into the fray, as Fenrisian tradition demands.
datasheet.unitComposition:
■ **1 Wolf Guard Battle Leader**

**This model is equipped with:** master‑crafted power weapon; storm shield.

abilities.name: Leader
abilities.rules:
Before the battle, in the Muster Armies step, for each leader and support unit in your army, you can select one friendly bodyguard unit that unit can lead. That unit will then lead that bodyguard unit for the battle and form an attached unit with it. 

Unless otherwise stated, each bodyguard unit can only have one leader unit and one support unit attached to it.

See Attached Units (19)
abilities.lore: Mighty heroes fight at the forefront of battle.

abilities.name: Tempered Ferocity
abilities.rules: While this model is leading a unit, weapons equipped by models in that unit have the **[SUSTAINED HITS 1]** ability and, each time a model in that unit makes an attack that targets an enemy unit within 6", re‑roll a Hit roll of 1.

abilities.name: Heroic Last Stand
abilities.rules: If this model is destroyed by a melee attack, if it has not fought this phase, roll one D6: on a 2+, do not remove it from play. The destroyed model can fight after the attacking unit has finished making its attacks, and is then removed from play.

datasheet_rules.rules:
This model can be attached to the following units:

■ **BLOOD CLAWS**
■ **GREY HUNTERS**
■ **WOLF GUARD HEADTAKERS**

■ This model’s storm shield can be replaced with one of the following:
◦ 1 master‑crafted bolt carbine
◦ 1 master‑crafted heavy bolt pistol
◦ 1 plasma pistol

This model’s storm shield can be replaced with one of the following:
This model’s storm shield can be replaced with one of the following:

datasheet.name: Wolf Guard Headtakers
datasheet.lore: It is the duty of Wolf Guard Headtakers to break through the enemy line and hunt down commanders and champions. In this task, they are aided by packs of Fenrisian hunting wolves. These cunning beasts scatter enemy formations and harry the Headtakers’ prey, enabling their handlers to close in and dispense the Allfather’s justice with their master‑crafted weapons.
datasheet.unitComposition:
■ **3‑6 Wolf Guard Headtakers**
■ **0‑6 Hunting Wolves**

**Every Wolf Guard Headtaker is equipped with:** heavy boltpistol; master‑crafted power weapon; storm shield.
**Every Hunting Wolf is equipped with:** teeth and claws.
datasheet.baseSize:
Wolf Guard Headtakers: 40mm
Hunting Wolves: 60x35.5mm Oval Base

abilities.name: Let Loose the Wolves
abilities.rules: At the start of the Declare Battle Formations step, split this unit into two units, one containing all of its **HEADTAKERS** models and one containing all of its **HUNTING WOLVES** models, with new Starting Strengths accordingly.

abilities.name: Headhunters
abilities.rules: At the start of the battle, select one unit from your opponent’s army to be this unit’s quarry. Weapons equipped by **HEADTAKERS** models in this unit have the **[DEVASTATING WOUNDS]** and **[PRECISION]** abilities while targeting its quarry. Each time this unit’s quarry is destroyed, select one new enemy unit to be this unit’s quarry. This ability can be used even if this unit is embarked within a **TRANSPORT**.

abilities.name: Hunting Hounds
abilities.rules: While this unit is within 6" of one or more friendly **SPACE WOLVES CHARACTER** models (excluding **WULFEN** models), if this unit is not Battle‑shocked, **HUNTING WOLVES** models in it have an Objective Control characteristic of 1.

wargear_rules.rulesText: ■ All of the models in this unit can each have their master‑crafted power weapon and storm shield replaced with 1 paired master‑crafted power weapons.

weapon_profiles.ruleText: The bearer has a 4+ invulnerable save.

wargear_options.instructionText: All of the models in this unit can each have their master‑crafted power weapon and storm shield replaced with 1 paired master‑crafted power weapons.

datasheet.name: Wolf Guard Terminators
datasheet.lore: Wolf Guard bedeck their Terminator armour with totems, trophies and marks of honour gained over their years of battle. They fight at the spearhead of assaults, eagerly seeking glory as enemy fire deflects harmlessly from their relic armour, the earth shaking beneath their heavy tread as they slay with stunning skill.
datasheet.unitComposition:
■ **1 Wolf Guard Terminator Pack Leader**
■ **4-9 Wolf Guard Terminators**

**The Wolf Guard Terminator Pack Leader is equipped with:** storm bolter; master‑crafted power weapon.
**Every Wolf Guard Terminator is equipped with:** storm bolter; master‑crafted power weapon.

abilities.name: Deep Strike
abilities.rules: Each time this unit makes an ingress move (20.04), if every model in this unit has this ability, it can be set up anywhere on the battlefield that is more than 8" horizontally from all enemy units, even if that is within your opponent’s deployment zone.
abilities.lore: There are many ways by which to deploy troops to the field of battle including tunnels, teleportation devices and other esoteric means of transportation.

abilities.name: Rugged Resilience
abilities.rules: Each time an attack targets this unit, if the Strength characteristic of that attack is greater than the Toughness characteristic of this unit, subtract 1 from the Wound roll.

wargear_rules.rulesText: ■ Any number of models can each have their storm bolter replaced with 1 storm shield.
■ For every 5 models in this unit, 1 Wolf Guard Terminator can replace its storm bolter and master‑crafted power weapon with 1 assault cannon and 1 power fist.

■ The Wolf Guard Terminator Pack Leader’s storm bolter and master‑crafted power weapon can be replaced with 1 of the following:
◦ 1 relic greataxe
◦ 1 twin lightning claws

weapon_profiles.ruleText: The bearer has a Wounds characteristic of 4.

wargear_options.instructionText: Any number of models can each have their storm bolter replaced with 1 storm shield.
The Wolf Guard Terminator Pack Leader’s storm bolter and master‑crafted power weapon can be replaced with 1 of the following:
The Wolf Guard Terminator Pack Leader’s storm bolter and master‑crafted power weapon can be replaced with 1 of the following:
Any number of models can each have their storm bolter replaced with 1 storm shield.
For every 5 models in this unit, 1 Wolf Guard Terminator can replace its storm bolter and master‑crafted power weapon with 1 assault cannon and 1 power fist.
For every 5 models in this unit, 1 Wolf Guard Terminator can replace its storm bolter and master‑crafted power weapon with 1 assault cannon and 1 power fist.

datasheet.name: Wolf Priest
datasheet.lore: Wolf Priests are elder sages who tend to their battle‑brothers’ spiritual and physical well‑being. In battle, they inspire by bellowing litanies and extracts from epic sagas. Clad in black, bedecked with shamanistic totems and wearing macabre wolf‑skull helms, they are terrifying to behold.
datasheet.unitComposition:
■ **1 Wolf Priest**

**This model is equipped with:** absolvor bolt pistol; crozius arcanum.

abilities.name: Leader
abilities.rules:
Before the battle, in the Muster Armies step, for each leader and support unit in your army, you can select one friendly bodyguard unit that unit can lead. That unit will then lead that bodyguard unit for the battle and form an attached unit with it. 

Unless otherwise stated, each bodyguard unit can only have one leader unit and one support unit attached to it.

See Attached Units (19)
abilities.lore: Mighty heroes fight at the forefront of battle.

abilities.name: Healing Balms
abilities.rules: While this model is leading a unit, in your Command phase, you can return 1 destroyed model (excluding **CHARACTER** models) to that unit.

abilities.name: Litany of Hate
abilities.rules: While this model is leading a unit, each time a model in that unit makes a melee attack, add 1 to the Wound roll.

datasheet_rules.name: Leader
datasheet_rules.rules:
This model can be attached to the following units:

■ **BLOOD CLAWS**
■ **GREY HUNTERS**
■ **WOLF GUARD HEADTAKERS**

datasheet.name: Wolf Scouts
datasheet.lore: Wolf Scouts are tasked with operating ahead of the main Space Wolves assault force, infiltrating enemy positions and seizing or sabotaging key locations. More than capable of operating alone for extended periods of time, they use guile and savagery to distract and harrass the foe.
datasheet.unitComposition:
■ **1 Wolf Scout Pack Leader**
■ **4 Wolf Scouts**
■ **1 Hunting Wolf**

OR

■ **1 Wolf Scout Pack Leader**
■ **9 Wolf Scouts**
■ **2 Hunting Wolves**

**The Wolf Scout Pack Leader model is equipped with:** plasma pistol; power weapon.
**Every Wolf Scout model is equipped with:** plasma pistol; combat blade.
**Every Hunting Wolf model is equipped with:** teeth and claws.
datasheet.baseSize:
Wolf Scouts: 32mm
Hunting Wolves: 60x35.5mm Oval Base

abilities.name: Infiltrators
abilities.rules: During deployment, if every model in a unit has this ability, it can be set up anywhere on the battlefield that is more than 8" horizontally from your opponent’s deployment zone and all enemy units.
abilities.lore: Many armies employ reconnaissance units who can sit concealed, waiting for the right moment to strike.

abilities.name: Scouts 7"
abilities.rules:
This ability always takes the form Scouts X". In the Resolve Pre‑battle Abilities step, if every model in a unit has this ability, you can do one of the following:
  • If that unit is in strategic reserves, you can set up that unit anywhere that is wholly within your deployment zone.
  • If that unit is wholly within your deployment zone, it can make a scout move (24.32).
  • If that unit is embarked within a DEDICATED TRANSPORT that is wholly within your deployment zone, and if every model embarked within that DEDICATED TRANSPORT has the Scouts ability, that DEDICATED TRANSPORT can make a scout move.
abilities.lore: Scouts form the vanguard of many armies. Unnoticed by the enemy, they range ahead of the main force.

abilities.name: Deadly Stalkers
abilities.rules: Each time a model in this unit makes an attack that targets an enemy unit, if there are no other units from your opponent’s army within 6" of that target, add 1 to the Wound roll.

abilities.name: Hunting Hounds
abilities.rules: While this unit is within 6" of one or more friendly **SPACE WOLVES CHARACTER** models (excluding **WULFEN** models), if this unit is not Battle-shocked, Hunting Wolves models in this unit have an Objective Control characteristic of 1.

wargear_rules.rulesText: ■ 1 Wolf Scout’s plasma pistol can be replaced with 1 plasma gun.
■ 1 Wolf Scout equipped with a plasma pistol can be equipped with 1 haywire mine (That model’s plasma pistol cannot be replaced).
■ 1 Wolf Scout’s plasma pistol and combat blade can be replaced with 1 bolt pistol, 1 Thunderclap and 1 runic stave.
■ If this unit contains 12 models, 1 Wolf Scout’s plasma pistol can be replaced with 1 instigator bolt carbine.

weapon_profiles.ruleText: Once per battle, at the start of any phase, you can select one enemy unit within 3" of the bearer and roll one D6: on a 2+, that enemy unit suffers D3 mortal wounds, or 2D3 mortal wounds instead if it is a **VEHICLE** unit.

wargear_options.instructionText: 1 Wolf Scout’s plasma pistol can be replaced with 1 plasma gun.
1 Wolf Scout equipped with a plasma pistol can be equipped with 1 haywire mine (That model’s plasma pistol cannot be replaced).
1 Wolf Scout’s plasma pistol and combat blade can be replaced with 1 bolt pistol, 1 Thunderclap and 1 runic stave.
1 Wolf Scout’s plasma pistol and combat blade can be replaced with 1 bolt pistol, 1 Thunderclap and 1 runic stave.
1 Wolf Scout’s plasma pistol and combat blade can be replaced with 1 bolt pistol, 1 Thunderclap and 1 runic stave.
If this unit contains 12 models, 1 Wolf Scout’s plasma pistol can be replaced with 1 instigator bolt carbine.

datasheet.name: Wulfen
datasheet.lore: Wulfen exist on the brink of constant berserk rages, and their chilling howls unleash the inner beast in the sons of Russ nearby. They are bestial warriors, altered by the curse lying in the blood of all scions of the Wolf King. They are hunters, bounding forward with fangs bared and claws outstretched.
datasheet.unitComposition:
■ **5-10 Wulfen**

**Every model is equipped with:** Wulfen weapons; death totem.

abilities.name: Savage Frenzy
abilities.rules: Each time an enemy unit (excluding **MONSTERS** and **VEHICLES**) within Engagement Range of this unit Falls Back, all models in that enemy unit must take a Desperate Escape test. When doing so, if that enemy unit is Battle‑shocked, subtract 1 from each of those tests.

wargear_rules.rulesText: ■ Any number of models can each have their death totem replaced with 1 stormfrag auto‑launcher.

weapon_profiles.ruleText: Each time the bearer makes a melee attack, re‑roll a Hit roll of 1.

wargear_options.instructionText: Any number of models can each have their death totem replaced with 1 stormfrag auto‑launcher.

datasheet.name: Wulfen with Storm Shields
datasheet.lore: When faced with armoured formations or monstrous xenos foes, the Space Wolves may equip their Wulfen warriors with thunder hammers and storm shields. Armed thus, Wulfen warriors can deflect even the heaviest barrage of fire and close with their prey, bringing their thunder hammers to bear and cracking open reinforced armour with ease.
datasheet.unitComposition:
■ **5-10 Wulfen**

**Every model is equipped with:** thunder hammer; death totem.

abilities.name: Hammer Blow
abilities.rules: In the Fight phase, after this unit has fought, select one enemy **MONSTER** or **VEHICLE** unit hit by one or more of those attacks. Until the end of the next turn, that enemy unit is suppressed. While a unit is suppressed, each time a model in that unit makes an attack, subtract 1 from the Hit roll.

wargear_rules.rulesText: ■ Any number of models can each have their death totem replaced with 1 stormfrag auto‑launcher.

weapon_profiles.ruleText: Each time the bearer makes a melee attack, re‑roll a Hit roll of 1.

wargear_options.instructionText: Any number of models can each have their death totem replaced with 1 stormfrag auto‑launcher.

datasheet.name: Wulfen Dreadnought
datasheet.lore: Even near death and interred in a Dreadnought sarcophagus, a warrior may yet succumb to the Curse of the Wulfen. Joints and servos twitch and spasm like a crazed animal’s muscles as a Wulfen Dreadnought seeks to maul and eviscerate. From emitters, baleful howls blare its mindless hunger for violence.
datasheet.unitComposition:
■ **1 Wulfen Dreadnought**

**This model is equipped with:** storm bolter; Fenrisian greataxe; great wolf claw.

abilities.name: Deadly Demise 1
abilities.rules:
This ability always takes the form Deadly Demise X. Each time a model in this unit is destroyed, after the units embarked within it (if any) have made their emergency disembark moves, roll one D6. On a 6, that model suffers a deadly demise; each unit within 6" of that model suffers a number of mortal wounds denoted by X (if this is a random number, roll separately for each unit within 6").

Example: An Impulsor with a unit of Intercessors embarked within it is destroyed by ranged attacks. First, any unresolved attacks made by the attacking unit are resolved. Then the Intercessors make an emergency disembark move. Then the roll is made for the Deadly Demise ability, and on a 6, that ability is resolved. Finally, the Impulsor is removed from the battlefield.
abilities.lore: From detonating ammo stores to corrosive innards or frenzied death throes, some targets are deadly even in defeat.

abilities.name: Feel No Pain 6+
abilities.rules: This ability always takes the form Feel No Pain X+. Each time a model with this ability would lose a wound, roll one D6: on an X+, that wound is not lost.
abilities.lore: The hardiest warriors refuse to be laid low, even by wounds that should by all rights prove lethal.

abilities.name: Bestial Rage
abilities.rules: In your opponent’s Shooting phase, when an enemy unit has shot, if this model lost a wound as a result of those attacks, this unit can make a **surge move** of up to D6+2".

abilities.name: Violent Fury
abilities.rules: If this model is equipped with two melee weapons, those weapon profiles have the **[TWIN-LINKED]** ability.

wargear_rules.rulesText: ■ This model’s Fenrisian great axe or great wolf claw and storm bolter can be replaced with 1 blizzard shield and 1 heavy flamer.
■ If this model is not equipped with a storm bolter, its heavy flamer can be replaced with 1 storm bolter.

weapon_profiles.ruleText: The bearer has a 4+ invulnerable save.

wargear_options.instructionText: This model’s Fenrisian great axe or great wolf claw and storm bolter can be replaced with 1 blizzard shield and 1 heavy flamer.
This model’s Fenrisian great axe or great wolf claw and storm bolter can be replaced with 1 blizzard shield and 1 heavy flamer.
If this model is not equipped with a storm bolter, its heavy flamer can be replaced with 1 storm bolter.
